Key Characteristics: The Boy Who Lived, brave, loyal, skilled wizard, known for defeating Voldemort.
Highly intelligent, studious, loyal friend, excellent spellcaster, often the voice of reason.
Loyal and brave friend to Harry, from a large wizarding family, provides comic relief and steadfast support.
Wise, powerful, Headmaster of Hogwarts, mentor figure, skilled in many forms of magic.
Potions Master, complex character with dual loyalties, skilled wizard, often strict and sarcastic.
The Dark Lord, seeks power and immortality, main antagonist, feared for his dark magic.
Half-giant, Keeper of Keys and Grounds at Hogwarts, loyal friend, loves magical creatures.
Rival to Harry, from a pure-blood family, often arrogant, prejudiced, and pressured by his family.
Harry's godfather, wrongly imprisoned, brave, loyal, skilled wizard, Animagus.
Defence Against the Dark Arts teacher, werewolf, kind, wise, loyal friend, struggles with his condition.
Ron's sister, talented witch, skilled Quidditch player, brave, develops a romantic relationship with Harry.
Transfiguration Professor, Deputy Headmistress, strict but fair, powerful witch, Animagus.
Initially timid and clumsy, grows into a brave and capable wizard, skilled in Herbology and dueling.
Eccentric, kind, believes in strange creatures, loyal friend, unique perspective on the world.
Loyal house-elf, fiercely devoted to Harry Potter, values freedom and friendship.
Fanatically loyal Death Eater, cruel, sadistic, powerful dark witch, highly skilled in dark arts.
Twin brother to George, prankster, co-owner of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, brave and loyal.
Twin brother to Fred, prankster, co-owner of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes, brave and loyal.
